Description: A splitter component for allowing users to resize two adjacent panels. Can be oriented horizontally or vertically and nested within each other. Note: This component is obsolete and will be removed in a future version. Please use MudSplitPanel instead.

Parameters.Name: Class
Parameters.Description:
The CSS classes applied to this component.
Remarks: Defaults to null. You can use spaces to separate multiple classes. Use the property to apply custom CSS styles.

Parameters.Name: Direction
Parameters.Description:
The orientation for the splitter.
Remarks: Defaults to .

Parameters.Name: EndMinimumSize
Parameters.Description:
The minimum percentage the will go.
Remarks: Defaults to 0.

Parameters.Name: EndSplitter
Parameters.Description: Sets the content in the right panel region when in horizontal mode, or the bottom panel region when in vertical mode.

Parameters.Name: Height
Parameters.Description:
Sets the height value for the splitter container.
Remarks: Defaults to 100%

Parameters.Name: SeparatorTemplate
Parameters.Description: The template for the separator, always in horizontal orientation. When used in vertical mode, the separator is rotated 90 degrees.

Parameters.Name: StartMinimumSize
Parameters.Description:
The minimum percentage the will go.
Remarks: Defaults to 0.

Parameters.Name: StartSize
Parameters.Description:
Sets or gets the starting size of the .
Remarks: Defaults to 50.

Parameters.Name: StartSizeChanged
Parameters.Description: Event callback for when the changes.

Parameters.Name: StartSplitter
Parameters.Description: Sets the content in the left panel region when in horizontal mode, or the top panel region when in vertical mode.

Parameters.Name: Style
Parameters.Description:
The CSS styles applied to this component.
Remarks: Defaults to null. Use the property to apply CSS classes.

Parameters.Name: Tag
Parameters.Description:
The arbitrary object to link to this component.
Remarks: This property is typically used to associate additional information with this component, such as a model containing data for this component.

Parameters.Name: UserAttributes
Parameters.Description:
The additional HTML attributes to apply to this component.
Remarks: This property is typically used to provide additional HTML attributes during rendering such as ARIA accessibility tags or a custom ID.

Parameters.Name: Width
Parameters.Description:
Sets the width value for the splitter container. Can be any valid CSS unit.
Remarks: Defaults to 100%
